title: No visual affordance for rotary bezel input on time picker
description: First-time users have no way to discover that hour/minute text is tappable and that the rotary bezel scrolls values. No hint text, no highlight ring, no animation. Users will try tapping repeatedly with no result.

PM.notes: Must-fix. First-time users won't discover bezel control.

Dev Lead.notes: Add hint text below time display, <5 lines.
